idea-plugin.name: Markdown WebView Preview (Experimental)
idea-plugin.description:
Provides a Markdown preview powered by an embedded WebView panel.
  • Renders Markdown content in the same kind of browser surface used by WebView-based IDE UI.
  • Uses browser engines: WKWebView on macOS, Microsoft Edge WebView2 on Windows, and JCEF on Linux.
  • Fits the WebView frontend workflow where UI and preview assets can be authored with HTML, CSS, TypeScript, frontend frameworks, Vite, and typed Kotlin/TypeScript interop.
